tasks.label: Build & Deploy Pip-Boy ADV to SD
tasks.command: Write-Host 'Building Pip-Boy ADV firmware...' -ForegroundColor Cyan; pio run; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { Write-Host 'Build successful! Deploying to SD card...' -ForegroundColor Green; $sdDrive = 'D:'; $appPath = Join-Path $sdDrive 'apps\PipBoyADV'; $assetsPath = Join-Path $appPath 'assets\Images'; Write-Host 'Creating directory structure...' -ForegroundColor Yellow; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $appPath -Force | Out-Null; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $assetsPath -Force | Out-Null; Write-Host 'Copying firmware binary...' -ForegroundColor Yellow; Copy-Item -Path '.pio\build\cardputer-adv\firmware.bin' -Destination (Join-Path $appPath 'main.bin') -Force; Write-Host 'Copying assets...' -ForegroundColor Yellow; if (Test-Path 'data\assets\Images') { Copy-Item -Path 'data\assets\Images\*' -Destination $assetsPath -Recurse -Force } else { Write-Host 'Warning: data/assets/Images not found, skipping asset copy' -ForegroundColor DarkYellow }; Write-Host 'Creating app.json...' -ForegroundColor Yellow; $appJson = @{ name = 'Pip-Boy ADV'; version = '1.0.0'; author = 'Evil0ctopus'; description = 'Pip-Boy OS for Cardputer ADV'; entry = 'main.bin'; category = 'tools' } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 10; Set-Content -Path (Join-Path $appPath 'app.json') -Value $appJson -Force; Write-Host 'Copying config template...' -ForegroundColor Yellow; if (Test-Path 'data\config.txt.example') { Copy-Item -Path 'data\config.txt.example' -Destination (Join-Path $sdDrive 'config.txt') -Force } else { Write-Host 'Warning: data/config.txt.example not found' -ForegroundColor DarkYellow }; Write-Host ''; Write-Host 'Deployment complete!' -ForegroundColor Green; Write-Host ''; Write-Host 'SD Card Structure:' -ForegroundColor Cyan; Write-Host "  $(Join-Path $sdDrive 'apps\PipBoyADV\main.bin')" -ForegroundColor White; Write-Host "  $(Join-Path $sdDrive 'apps\PipBoyADV\app.json')" -ForegroundColor White; Write-Host "  $(Join-Path $sdDrive 'apps\PipBoyADV\assets\Images')" -ForegroundColor White; Write-Host "  $(Join-Path $sdDrive 'config.txt')" -ForegroundColor White } else { Write-Host 'Build failed! Deployment aborted.' -ForegroundColor Red; exit 1 }

tasks.label: Build & Package OTA Firmware
tasks.command: Write-Host 'Building Pip-Boy ADV OTA firmware bundle...' -ForegroundColor Cyan; pio run; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { Write-Host 'Build successful! Packaging OTA firmware...' -ForegroundColor Green; $version = (Get-Content 'version.txt').Trim(); $sdDrive = 'D:'; $otaPath = Join-Path $sdDrive 'firmwares\PipBoyADV'; $buildPath = '.pio\build\cardputer-adv'; Write-Host 'Creating OTA firmware directory...' -ForegroundColor Yellow; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $otaPath -Force | Out-Null; Write-Host 'Copying firmware.bin...' -ForegroundColor Yellow; Copy-Item -Path (Join-Path $buildPath 'firmware.bin') -Destination (Join-Path $otaPath 'firmware.bin') -Force; Write-Host 'Copying bootloader.bin...' -ForegroundColor Yellow; Copy-Item -Path (Join-Path $buildPath 'bootloader.bin') -Destination (Join-Path $otaPath 'bootloader.bin') -Force; Write-Host 'Copying partitions.bin...' -ForegroundColor Yellow; Copy-Item -Path (Join-Path $buildPath 'partitions.bin') -Destination (Join-Path $otaPath 'partitions.bin') -Force; Write-Host 'Copying icon.png...' -ForegroundColor Yellow; if (Test-Path 'icon.png') { Copy-Item -Path 'icon.png' -Destination (Join-Path $otaPath 'icon.png') -Force } else { Write-Host '  ⚠ icon.png not found, skipping' -ForegroundColor DarkYellow }; Write-Host 'Creating app.json manifest...' -ForegroundColor Yellow; $appJson = @{ name = 'Pip-Boy ADV'; version = $version; author = 'Evil0ctopus'; description = 'Pip-Boy OS with CRT theme and sound effects'; type = 'firmware'; entry = 'firmware.bin'; icon = 'icon.png' } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 10; Set-Content -Path (Join-Path $otaPath 'app.json') -Value $appJson -Force; Write-Host ''; Write-Host 'OTA firmware bundle created successfully!' -ForegroundColor Green; Write-Host "  Version: $version" -ForegroundColor White; Write-Host ''; Write-Host 'SD Card OTA Structure:' -ForegroundColor Cyan; Write-Host "  $(Join-Path $sdDrive 'firmwares\PipBoyADV\firmware.bin')" -ForegroundColor White; Write-Host "  $(Join-Path $sdDrive 'firmwares\PipBoyADV\bootloader.bin')" -ForegroundColor White; Write-Host "  $(Join-Path $sdDrive 'firmwares\PipBoyADV\partitions.bin')" -ForegroundColor White; Write-Host "  $(Join-Path $sdDrive 'firmwares\PipBoyADV\app.json')" -ForegroundColor White; if (Test-Path (Join-Path $otaPath 'icon.png')) { Write-Host "  $(Join-Path $sdDrive 'firmwares\PipBoyADV\icon.png')" -ForegroundColor White }; Write-Host ''; Write-Host 'Install from: M5 Launcher > Install Firmware' -ForegroundColor Cyan } else { Write-Host 'Build failed! OTA packaging aborted.' -ForegroundColor Red; exit 1 }

tasks.label: Build & Create GitHub Release
tasks.command:
Write-Host 'Building Pip-Boy ADV for GitHub Release...' -ForegroundColor Cyan; pio run; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { Write-Host 'Build successful! Creating GitHub release package...' -ForegroundColor Green; $version = (Get-Content 'version.txt').Trim(); $timestamp = Get-Date -Format 'yyyyMMdd_HHmmss'; $releaseName = "PipBoyADV_v${version}_${timestamp}"; $releasesDir = 'releases'; $buildPath = '.pio\build\cardputer-adv'; Write-Host "Creating releases directory..." -ForegroundColor Yellow; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $releasesDir -Force | Out-Null; $zipPath = Join-Path $releasesDir "${releaseName}.zip"; Write-Host "Packaging release: ${releaseName}.zip" -ForegroundColor Yellow; $appJson = @{ name = 'Pip-Boy ADV'; version = $version; author = 'Evil0ctopus'; description = 'Pip-Boy OS with full CRT theme and sound effects'; type = 'firmware'; entry = 'firmware.bin'; icon = 'icon.png' } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 10; Set-Content -Path (Join-Path $buildPath 'app.json') -Value $appJson -Force; $readme = @"
# Pip-Boy ADV Firmware v${version}

## Installation via M5 Launcher
1. Copy all files to: /firmware/PipBoyADV/ on SD card
2. Open M5 Launcher > Install Firmware > Pip-Boy ADV

## Features
- Full Pip-Boy green CRT theme
- Enhanced boot animation with sound
- Real-time system stats
- Sound effects (toggle in SYSTEM tab)
- Auto-versioning system

## Build Info
- Version: ${version}
- Date: $(Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss')
- Platform: ESP32-S3
"@; Set-Content -Path (Join-Path $buildPath 'README.txt') -Value $readme -Force; Compress-Archive -Path @((Join-Path $buildPath 'firmware.bin'), (Join-Path $buildPath 'bootloader.bin'), (Join-Path $buildPath 'partitions.bin'), (Join-Path $buildPath 'app.json'), (Join-Path $buildPath 'README.txt')) -DestinationPath $zipPath -Force -CompressionLevel Optimal; if (Test-Path 'icon.png') { Compress-Archive -Path 'icon.png' -Update -DestinationPath $zipPath }; $zipSize = (Get-Item $zipPath).Length; Write-Host ''; Write-Host 'GitHub Release Package Created!' -ForegroundColor Green; Write-Host "  File: $zipPath" -ForegroundColor White; Write-Host "  Size: $([math]::Round($zipSize/1KB, 2)) KB" -ForegroundColor White; Write-Host "  Version: $version" -ForegroundColor White; Write-Host ''; Write-Host 'Upload this ZIP to GitHub Releases' -ForegroundColor Cyan } else { Write-Host 'Build failed! Release packaging aborted.' -ForegroundColor Red; exit 1 }
